description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by a rectangular fence and dense trees, creating a private, enclosed property. The house features a symmetrical front facade with two prominent entry columns, a central door, and evenly spaced windows. A driveway leads to an attached garage on one side, while the backyard includes a swimming pool, patio area, and a small outbuilding or pool house. The roof is a traditional gable style, and the property is bordered by lush landscaping, including mature trees and hedges. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial or Georgian architecture, with a formal, balanced appearance. The house is set within a well-maintained yard, providing ample outdoor space and privacy.
description: A large, two-story Colonial-style house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard featuring a pool and garage. Surrounded by dense trees and landscaping, it offers a private, formal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entry with columns, driveway, garage, and fenced yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, garage, and the backyard pool area with patio and outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and the back of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, side yard, and the arrangement of trees and fencing around the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with double columns, steps, and a prominent door flanked by windows
